hooks.command: echo '[SDLC Hook] post-artifact-created: Artifact written. Run /sdlc-glossary validate on this artifact and update sdlc-manifest.json artifact list for the current phase.'
hooks.description: post-artifact-created: reminds Claude to run glossary validation and register artifact in manifest after every Write tool call that creates an artifact

hooks.command: if [ -f "$(find . -name 'sdlc-manifest.json' -maxdepth 3 | head -1)" ]; then echo '[SDLC] Active product run detected. Run /sdlc-status to see current phase and next actions.'; fi
hooks.description: Reminds the user of the active product run at the end of each session

pre-phase-advance.description: DoD gate enforced by /sdlc-next command. Reads current phase DoD from CLAUDE.md, checks artifact inventory in sdlc-manifest.json, surfaces gaps as advisory warnings, requires acknowledgment before advancing.

post-artifact-created.description: After any artifact is written: (1) invoke core/glossary → validate on the artifact, (2) invoke core/artifact-manifest → register artifact in sdlc-manifest.json for the current phase, (3) if TERM_DRIFT or methodology violations found, add warning to manifest.

pre-event-storming.description: Before /sdlc-event-storm: verify that functional requirements and NFRs exist in artifacts/ideate/requirements/. If not, block with advisory message.

pre-implement.description: Before any implement/* skill generates code: verify that a TDD spec exists at artifacts/implement/specs/{feature}.md. If not, warn and require acknowledgment.

pre-code-generation.description: Before implement/service-skeleton: verify coding-standards.md and repo-structure.md exist. If not, block.

pre-deploy.description: Before any deploy/* skill: verify quality/test-plan.md and design/security/threat-model.md exist. If not, warn.

pre-uat.description: Before validate/uat-plan: verify quality/reports/ contains at least one test execution report and validate/acceptance-checklist.md exists.

terminology-drift-detector.description: Cross-artifact terminology scan. Invoked by /sdlc-review or on-demand via /sdlc-glossary validate.

adr-conflict-detector.description: After design/adr skill writes a new ADR: read all existing ADRs and check for conflicts or supersession. Report as warning if found.

contract-compliance-checker.description: After design/event-schema or implement/contract-definition: check generated schema against existing consumer contracts in artifacts/implement/contracts/.

security-gate.description: After any design/* artifact touching auth, data access, encryption, or external APIs: add a manifest warning flagging the artifact for Security Reviewer agent review.

compliance-gate.description: After any artifact tagged [COMPLIANCE]: record in manifest that this artifact needs Compliance Assessor agent review. Track coverage per framework.
